name: IdsEdwMbrMedAlertILoad

text.value: WITH updt AS (UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_MED_ALERT_I SET SRC_SYS_CD = st.SRC_SYS_CD, MBR_UNIQ_KEY = st.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, PRCS_YR_MO_SK = st.PRCS_YR_MO_SK, MED_ALERT_ID = st.MED_ALERT_ID, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK = st.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, MED_ALERT_SK = st.MED_ALERT_SK, MBR_MED_MESRS_SK = st.MBR_MED_MESRS_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = st.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM S82Y_TMP_IdsEdwMbrMedAlertILoad st WHERE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_MED_ALERT_I.MBR_MED_ALERT_SK = st.MBR_MED_ALERT_SK) INSERT INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_MED_ALERT_I (MBR_MED_ALERT_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, MBR_UNIQ_KEY, PRCS_YR_MO_SK, MED_ALERT_ID, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, MED_ALERT_SK, MBR_MED_MESRS_SK, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK) SELECT st.MBR_MED_ALERT_SK, st.SRC_SYS_CD, st.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, st.PRCS_YR_MO_SK, st.MED_ALERT_ID, st.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, st.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, st.MED_ALERT_SK, st.MBR_MED_MESRS_SK, st.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, st.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM S82Y_TMP_IdsEdwMbrMedAlertILoad st WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_MED_ALERT_I t WHERE t.MBR_MED_ALERT_SK = st.MBR_MED_ALERT_SK)
